_comment: MeshCentral config — uploaded to /mnt/tank/system/apps-config/meshcentral/data/config.json. Behind the NAS mgmt-plane Traefik at https://mc.w1.lv/ — MeshCentral serves plain HTTP internally; Traefik terminates TLS using the wildcard *.w1.lv cert. `TlsOffload: '10.10.5.20'` tells MeshCentral it's proxied (generated URLs use https:// despite HTTP backend); `Cert` field is the public SNI name Traefik routes on.
